x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR Performance Analytics job configurations (pa_job_config) drive the collection of worker productivity metrics that Now Assist HRSD uses for AI-driven workload balancing and capacity recommendations. Without active PA jobs collecting HR metrics, AI workload optimization is not possible.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure Performance Analytics collection jobs for HR metrics via pa_job_config_list.do. Track cases per agent, average resolution time, and queue depth. Target: 2+ active HR PA job configurations. Now Assist HRSD uses these metrics for AI-driven workload balancing.
